ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the server software */,
  "user_modes" TEXT /* User modes supported by the server */,
  "chan_modes" TEXT /* Channel modes supported by the server */,
  "channel_modes_with_params" TEXT /* Channel modes with parameters supported by the server */,
  "user_modes_with_params" TEXT /* User modes with parameters supported by the server */,
  "server_modes" TEXT /* Server modes supported by the server */,
  "server_modes_with_params" TEXT /* Server modes with parameters supported by the server */,
  "server_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the server */,
  "server_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the server */,
  "server_operators" TEXT /* List of user IDs who are operators of the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "registered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was registered */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last seen online */,
  "user_modes_default" TEXT /* Default user modes applied to the user */,
  "channels_joined" INTEGER /* Number of channels the user has joined */,
  "messages_sent" INTEGER /* Number of messages sent by the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country based on their IP address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel was created */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the channel */,
  "channel_topic_set_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the channel topic */,
  "channel_topic_set_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel topic was set */,
  "channel_modes_default" TEXT /* Default channel modes applied to the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the connection */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the user is connecting to */,
  "connected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user connected */,
  "disconnected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user disconnected */,
  "connection_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the connection */,
  "connection_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's connection */,
  "connection_port" INTEGER /* Port number used for the connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the connection the message was sent on */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of message */,
  "message_target" TEXT /* Target of the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES connections ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_members" (
  "channel_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel member */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel the user is a member of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "member_modes" TEXT /* Modes applied to the user in the channel */,
  "member_joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the channel */,
  "member_last_seen_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last seen in the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_members_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_modes" (
  "channel_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel mode */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel the mode is set on */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode that was set */,
  "mode_set_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the mode */,
  "mode_set_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mode was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_modes_mode_set_by FOREIGN KEY ("mode_set_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_modes_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_modes" (
  "user_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user mode */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the mode is set on */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode that was set */,
  "mode_set_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the mode */,
  "mode_set_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mode was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_modes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_modes_mode_set_by FOREIGN KEY ("mode_set_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_modes" (
  "server_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server mode */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the mode is set on */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode that was set */,
  "mode_set_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the mode */,
  "mode_set_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mode was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_modes_mode_set_by FOREIGN KEY ("mode_set_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_modes_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_messages" (
  "server_message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server message */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the connection the message was sent on */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of message */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_messages_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES connections ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irc_commands" (
  "irc_command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IRC command or reply */,
  "command" TEXT /* Command or reply name */,
  "reply" TEXT /* Reply code or command syntax */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the command or reply */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol of the command or reply (RFC 2812 or KineIRCd) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("irc_command_id")
)
